response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as featuring Hoshimachi Suisei performing 'I don't care' (もうどうなってもいいや). 2. Noted credits for songwriters Yuki Tsujimura and Naoki Itai on screen. 3. Used the search tool to find the official lyrics for 'I don't care' by Hoshimachi Suisei. 4. Verified the song title and credits. 5. Mapped the scenes and generated the structured JSON output.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional snippet featuring Hoshimachi Suisei performing her song 'I don't care' (Japanese: 'もうどうなってもいいや'). The scene is a moody, indoor performance space lit by numerous lamps, accompanied by a small ensemble. Text on screen indicates the title and credits.

scenes.description: A black screen fades into a title card for Hoshimachi Suisei's 8th-anniversary concert, featuring an illustration of her. No singing.
The performance begins. Suisei sings 'I don't care' in a room filled with lamps, accompanied by a small live band. Credits for the song (Yuki Tsujimura, Naoki Itai) are shown.
scenes.song_title: I don't care (もうどうなってもいいや)
